guardrail: This layer is a source-intake and review aid. Candidate sources are not claim facts until the primary source has been ingested or manually checked.

existing_focus_sources.title: Visie Gezondheidsbeleid Almere 2024-2026
existing_focus_sources.inventory_notes: Agendawijzer summary page with useful local policy signals but not the full policy text.

existing_focus_sources.title: Maatschappelijke agenda 2024-2034
existing_focus_sources.inventory_notes: Agendawijzer summary page that points to underlying municipal documents rather than replacing them.

existing_focus_sources.title: Transformatieplan Positief Gezond Almere
existing_focus_sources.inventory_notes: Core local implementation source for Almere, but not itself a D5/D6 source document.

existing_focus_sources.title: Naar een positief gezond Almere; Beleidstheorie en businesscase transformatieplan
existing_focus_sources.inventory_notes: Commissioned research and business-case report that can support local claim and impact interpretation.

existing_focus_sources.title: Zorgzaam Flevoland 2023 Regioplan IZA Flevoland
existing_focus_sources.inventory_notes: Regional IZA implementation plan with strong governance, monitoring, and Almere relevance; it contains structured visuals, but not stable table evidence we currently want to treat as table-bearing for downstream extraction.

existing_focus_sources.title: Regiobeeld Flevoland 2023
existing_focus_sources.inventory_notes: Regional baseline evidence report for needs, pressures, and context rather than normative policy content; the current corpus behaves as narrative/regional evidence, not as a reliable table source.

existing_focus_sources.title: Opdracht voor de werkagenda samenwerking zorg en sociaal domein voor D5 AZWA
existing_focus_sources.inventory_notes: Operational source document for the D5 workagenda, with the concrete products, milestones, and regional-to-municipal process needed to unlock the AZWA middelen.

existing_focus_sources.title: Format werkagenda basisfunctionaliteiten AZWA
existing_focus_sources.inventory_notes: Operational AZWA format for the D5 workagenda, useful for tracing which local and regional fields, planning elements, and implementation commitments are expected in 2026.

existing_focus_sources.title: Toelichting producten en proces
existing_focus_sources.inventory_notes: Short process note that explains the D5 workagenda products, the relation to the regioplan, and the target dates around 26 May, mid-September, and 15 November 2026.

candidate_sources.title: Onderliggende stukken Maatschappelijke agenda 2024-2034
candidate_sources.why_it_matters: Replaces the weaker Agendawijzer summary page with the council proposal, attachments, amendments, and adopted decision material.
candidate_sources.review_question: Download the actual Documentwijzer attachments and decide which are primary policy sources versus supporting council-process records.

candidate_sources.title: Onderliggende stukken Visie Gezondheidsbeleid Almere 2024-2026
candidate_sources.why_it_matters: Replaces the weaker Agendawijzer summary page with the adopted local health-policy text and decision trail.
candidate_sources.review_question: Download the actual Documentwijzer attachments and separate adopted policy text from motions, amendments, and debate notes.

candidate_sources.title: Raadsbrief Stand van zaken Gezondheidsbeleid (IZA en GALA)
candidate_sources.why_it_matters: The deep-research note treats this as a likely local bridge source for IZA/GALA status, but it should not be used as fact until the primary source is found.
candidate_sources.review_question: Search Documentwijzer, Notubiz, and council incoming/outgoing letters for the exact 2 February 2025 raadsbrief before adding claims.

candidate_sources.title: Gezondheidsmonitor Volwassenen en Ouderen 2024
candidate_sources.why_it_matters: Provides current municipal baseline data for overgewicht, valrisico, eenzaamheid, mentale gezondheid, bewegen, and vulnerability.
candidate_sources.review_question: Ingest the adult and older-person tables separately and preserve municipality-level Almere rows for later capacity calculations.

candidate_sources.title: Tabellenboek volwassenen 2024 - Flevoland alle gemeenten
candidate_sources.why_it_matters: Primary table source for adult Almere indicators needed in workagenda prioritization.
candidate_sources.review_question: Add as raw regional source and keep table extraction separate from narrative policy claims.

candidate_sources.title: Valpreventie
candidate_sources.why_it_matters: Operational source for current Almere valpreventie intake/inloop signals and delivery context.
candidate_sources.review_question: Extract only current operational routes and dates; avoid treating event announcements as durable policy.

candidate_sources.title: Doorontwikkeling Zorgzaam Flevoland naar een toekomstbestendige samenwerkingsstructuur
candidate_sources.why_it_matters: Strengthens the regional governance story around Zorgzaam Flevoland, including Almere as responsible organization in a 2025-2027 development route.
candidate_sources.review_question: Check whether this is a project registration, grant decision, or substantive governance source before promoting it as evidence.

candidate_sources.title: Alle netwerken - Mentale gezondheidsnetwerken
candidate_sources.why_it_matters: Clarifies that Almere is listed as mandaatgemeente for the Flevoland mental-health network and that Zeewolde is in a different listed route.
candidate_sources.review_question: Add as a role source, but do not overgeneralize it to all IZA/AZWA regional workstreams.

candidate_sources.title: Programmarekening 2024
candidate_sources.why_it_matters: Potential municipal financial and execution-status source for PGA, IZA and GALA references in Almere's own accountability cycle.
candidate_sources.review_question: Use as a local accountability source, not as a replacement for the actual policy or workagenda documents.

candidate_sources.title: Bevolkingsgroei in 2024 afgenomen in de Randstad, toegenomen daarbuiten
candidate_sources.why_it_matters: Useful context for growth pressure, but exact workagenda calculations should use a chosen BRP/CBS peildatum.
candidate_sources.review_question: Do not use news-rate figures as denominator data; choose a stable population table for calculations in Sprint 25.3.

next_actions: Download the Documentwijzer attachments for 24118 and 24161 or record why direct download is blocked.
Ingest the GGD Flevoland 2024 adult and older-person tables as separate regional data sources.
Add the mental-health-network listing as a role source while keeping its scope limited to MGN.
Keep the missing 2 February 2025 raadsbrief as a human lookup task until a public source is found.
Use this layer to drive Sprint 25.3 nulmeting/capacity work, especially target-level denominators and current provision.
